commit_queue.commit_subject: docs(plans): archive plan-1 and refresh plan-2 freshness for parallel-execution arc

claims.intent: Retire smoke-tests directory + vitest.smoke.config.ts + smoke:* scripts (cycles 1a-1d); add proper unit/integration replacement for dev-server-boots coverage (cycle 1c); claim cycle 2 audit areas separately at start; author no-real-io-in-tests ESLint rule (cycle 3, root-config wire-up gated on cycle 2 close).
claims.notes: Parallel-safe with Fronded Climbing Thicket (plan 2 SENTRY_MODE rename). File-level independent — no overlap with packages/core/env/, packages/core/observability/, packages/libs/sentry-node/, packages/libs/env-resolution/, or apps/*/src/observability/, apps/*/src/env.ts, apps/*/src/lib/env.ts, apps/*/src/runtime-config*.ts. Cycle 2 audit areas (packages/core, libs, sdks, apps/oak-search-cli, agent-tools) will be claimed separately at cycle 2 start.

claims.intent: Plan-2 atomic SENTRY_MODE → OBSERVABILITY_SINKS rename across producer (sentry-node), env, both apps, plus Cycle 2 ADR-171 and Cycle 3 README/.env.example updates. Planning hygiene already complete in working tree (plan 1 archived, plan 2 freshness refreshed).
claims.notes: Boot probe verified plan 1's outcome holds (server listening reached at ~142ms with SENTRY_MODE=sentry and no Vercel env). Parallel session: Moonlit Shimmering Comet on plan 3 (claim 8ed6386d) — file-level disjoint per Moonlit's notes. Soft potential overlap on apps/oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http/src/observability/http-observability.{unit,integration}.test.ts: I will modify these as part of plan 2 cycle 1; Moonlit's broad src/**/*.test.ts glob covers cycle 1c (NEW test file, not the observability ones) and cycle 2d audit (read-only unless violations found). If overlap surfaces I'll ping via comms event.

claims.intent: Stage and commit plan-1 archive + plan-2 freshness + comms event + claim addition.
